headline: Want 6% Monthly Yield Without Touching the Riskiest Junk? This ETF Has a Clever Trick
summary: When a bond gets stripped of its investment-grade status, pension funds dump it in a panic and prices collapse, which is exactly the moment one ETF swoops in to buy bonds from companies like Nissan and Vodafone at a discount and pocket the yield.
